overall.description: Cinematic third-person gameplay footage inside a detailed medieval tavern with warm firelight, timber architecture, and patrons on two levels. The character stands observing the cozy interior while NPCs populate the balcony and seating areas.

scene_state.functional_zone: two-story medieval tavern with balcony seating and central fireplace

events.description: character raises right arm slightly while observing the tavern interior
patron enters frame from right side walking toward the center area

agents.ego_description: standing near the entrance area observing the tavern interior, briefly raising an arm

notable_agents.action: standing on upper balcony behind wooden railing looking down at the main floor
walking into frame from the right side heading toward the center tables

entered.detail: wooden railing on second floor with NPCs standing behind it
large iron chandelier with multiple candles hanging from the ceiling beam
large stone fireplace with active fire providing warm orange illumination
wooden tavern sign with carved lettering mounted on the upper balcony
mounted deer skull with antlers hanging below the tavern sign
lit candle sconces mounted on the wooden support pillars
rough wooden tables and chairs with seated patrons
large framed map hanging on the right wall

segments.scene_description: The character stands in a cozy, firelit medieval tavern with timber architecture and a prominent upper balcony. Warm light from the central fireplace and chandeliers illuminates patrons seated at wooden tables and standing on the balcony. The character briefly raises an arm while observing the space, and a patron enters from the right toward the end of the clip.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot captures a steady observation of a cozy, firelit medieval tavern that remains focused on the warmth and activity of the interior. It begins with the character standing amidst timber architecture, where the glow from a central fireplace and hanging chandeliers illuminates patrons gathered at wooden tables. As the character briefly raises an arm to observe the space, the camera maintains its gaze on the prominent upper balcony and the surrounding rustic details. The scene then shifts slightly in dynamic as a patron enters from the right, adding a sense of movement to the otherwise still and inviting atmosphere.
